items.definition_en: A race is a competition to see who is the fastest.
items.example_en: The race was very exciting to watch.

items.definition_en: A car is a vehicle with four wheels that people drive.
items.example_en: He drives a fast car in Formula 1.

items.definition_en: A driver is a person who controls a vehicle.
items.example_en: The driver wore a special helmet.

items.definition_en: A team is a group of people working together.
items.example_en: Each team wants to win the race.

items.definition_en: A track is a road or path for racing.
items.example_en: The cars line up on the track.

items.definition_en: A helmet is a hard hat that protects your head.
items.example_en: He wears a helmet for safety.

items.definition_en: An engine is the part of a car that makes it move.
items.example_en: His car has a powerful engine.

items.definition_en: A lap is one complete trip around the track.
items.example_en: He finished the last lap first.

items.definition_en: A wheel is a round part that helps things move.
items.example_en: The mechanic changed a wheel during the race.

items.definition_en: A mechanic is a person who fixes cars.
items.example_en: The mechanic worked quickly in the pit stop.

items.definition_en: The finish line is the end of a race.
items.example_en: He crossed the finish line first.

items.definition_en: A trophy is a prize for winning a competition.
items.example_en: The winner lifted the trophy high.

items.definition_en: A flag is a piece of fabric used as a sign or symbol.
items.example_en: The race started when the flag dropped.

items.definition_en: A grand prix is a big race for cars held in Formula 1.
items.example_en: She watched the famous grand prix on TV.

items.definition_en: A stadium is a large place for sports events.
items.example_en: Thousands of fans filled the stadium.

items.definition_en: A podium is a platform for winners in a race.
items.example_en: The top drivers stood on the podium.

items.definition_en: A tyre is the rubber part around a wheel.
items.example_en: The team changed the tyre quickly.

items.definition_en: A champion is the best person in a competition.
items.example_en: He became the world champion in Formula 1.
